svg.title: Figure 4 panel. Predictions and falsification regions, per perspective.
svg.desc: 4 rows (perspectives) by 5 columns (perspective, topography, band, latency, falsification region).
svg.text: Figure 4. Predictions and falsification regions, per perspective
Each perspective makes a different prediction at the 0-500 ms post-shot-onset window.
No falsification region; this perspective is the
covariate, not the prediction. If LLR plus motion
energy explain all condition-level variance, the
four-perspective ranking falls back to bottom-up
of effect, or by relocation to non-central sites.
A surviving cluster overlapping the Lipkin
by surviving frontal F3/F4 asymmetry in
Topographic predictions are stated at the electrode level (10-20 system) and at the equivalent IC cluster centroid. Cluster-level alpha p < 0.05.
